name: IBM Extended Transaction Systems Family — Aberdeen Group Profile (1997)
description: Structured archival data package derived from Aberdeen Group's 1997 profile of IBM's Extended Transaction Systems (ETS) product family, covering MQSeries, CICS/Encina Transaction Server, Lotus Notes, DB2, and IMS for network-computing transaction processing.

creator.name: Aberdeen Group, Inc.
creator.address: One Boston Place, Boston, Massachusetts 02108 USA

about.name: Enterprise Transaction Processing Middleware
about.description: IBM Extended Transaction Systems product family for network-computing transaction processing
